name: Albert Einstein
abstract: Albert Einstein (14 March 1879 – 18 April 1955) was a German-born theoretical physicist best known for developing the known theory of relativity. Einstein also made important contributions to quantum theory.

concerts.label: Concert in Honor of Prof. Albert Einstein

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: She said Jane Goodall and Albert Einstein. She said it’s Einstein’s birthday, mine, Prince Albert, Billy Crystal, and Michael Caine.
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Al Rose
about_quotes.evidence: And the government made it possible for me to interview Albert Einstein and John Dewey. And this is how I met Rivera, too.

about_quotes.speaker: Aebersold Jamey
about_quotes.evidence: But it’s kind of like what Albert Einstein says, too: “Imagination is more important than knowledge.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Aebersold Jamey — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
